---
title: Joint OSC Symposium on the DAGStat Conference 2019
date: 2026-02-23
categories:
  - Symposium
event:
  start_date: '2019-03-18'
  end_date: ''
  description: |
    Computational Statstics and Statistical Software III Symposium on the DAGStat Conference 2019

  time: '9:00-10:40'
  location:
    name: online
    address: 
    map_url: 
  format:
    type: Online
    detail: ''
  language:
    primary: English
    primary-code: en
    detail: en

links:
  registration: 
  materials:  https://osf.io/pjthu/files/osfstorage
  workshop_website: https://www.dagstat2019.statistik.uni-muenchen.de/index.html
event_description: |
  Since Monday, March 18th, the [DAGStat Conference 2019](https://www.dagstat2019.statistik.uni-muenchen.de/index.html) has been taking place in Munich with the motto *"Statistics under one umbrella"*. Accordingly, we contributed a joint OSC symposium *"Computational Statistics and Statistical Software III (Open science and reproducibility)"*. Each talk and a link to the respective slides can be found below:

  | Time | Talk |
  |------|------|
  | 09:00 am – 09:20 am | **Open Science and statistics**  <br>*[Anne-Laure Boulesteix](../../people/people/anne-laure-boulesteix.qmd)*  <br>slides: <https://osf.io/u2zbc/> |
  | 09:20 am – 09:40 am | **Research Software Engineers**  <br>*[Heidi Seibold](../../people/people/heidi-seibold.qmd)*  <br>slides: <https://osf.io/eaj6m/> |
  | 09:40 am – 10:00 am | **Reproducible Methodological Research and Scientific Publishing**  <br>*[Fabian Scheipl](../../people/people/fabian-scheipl.qmd)*  <br>slides: <https://osf.io/5ahkb/> |
  | 10:00 am – 10:20 am | **Correcting for bias in the literature: A comparison of metaanalytic methods for bias-correction**  <br>*[Felix D. Schönbrodt](../../people/people/felix-schoenbrodt.qmd)*  <br>slides: <https://osf.io/hkyrx/> |
  | 10:20 am – 10:40 am | **The multiplicity of possible analysis strategies and how it is handled across scientific disciplines**  <br>*[Sabine Hoffmann](../../people/people/sabine-hoffmann.qmd)*  <br>slides: <https://osf.io/ykbux/> |

  Thank you very much for coming!
  
instructors:
  - name: 
    url: ''

helpers:
  - name: 
    url:  
  - name: 
    url: 
contact:
  name: Deutsche Arbeitsgemeinschaft Statistik (DAGStat)
  email: dagstat2019@stat.uni-muenchen.de 
organizers:
  - name: Deutsche Arbeitsgemeinschaft Statistik (DAGStat)
presenters:
  - name: Anne-Laure Boulesteix
    url: 
  - name: Heidi Seibold
    url: 
  - name: Fabian Scheipl
    url: 
  - name: Felix D. Schönbrodt
    url: 
  - name: Sabine Hoffmann
    url: 
    affiliation: 
  - name: 
    url: 
host:
  - name: LMU Department of Statistics
    url: ''
  - name: LMU Open Science Center (OSC)

template: templates/event-template.html
filters:
    - templates/process-event-yaml.lua
---

<!-- Extra content, namely executable R, Python, and Julia code can be added here if desired, and will be rendered at the bottom of the Overview header, but before the presenters/instructors/helpers/contact sections. -->
